narrative:
West Farmington Village (precinct in Trumbull County) has 295 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
